title: CustomAddressFieldSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents the settings for custom address fields.

enableCustomAddressField.description: Indicates whether the Address Field Type is available for custom fields (true) or not (false). The default value is false. Custom Address Fields can’t be disabled. When enableCustomAddressField is set to true, you can’t change the value to false. Note: Before you set this field to true, review Custom Address Fields Requirements and Limitations in Salesforce Help.
